rule_text: AP stores inspection AUTHORITY must be DISTINCT from the order-placing authority — the inspecting authority and the authority competent to place purchase orders shall in no case be the same person.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 138 / Inspection (C)(c)
verification_method: Check tender file: PO-issuing officer != Inspecting officer; reject same-person sign-off as COI/material-irregularity

rule_text: For AP stores receipts > Rs.1,000 from any source: stores worth more than 10% in value must be checked both for quality and (where necessary) quantity by a Junior Officer and certified on receipt voucher; for receipts > Rs.5,000, stores worth more than 5% must be checked by a higher officer.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 138 / Inspection (C)(c)(i)-(ii)
verification_method: Check tender SCC includes layered-inspection thresholds 10%/5% with Junior Officer/Higher Officer certification

rule_text: AP Government servants shall not hold stores in stock in EXCESS of the amount likely to be required during a reasonable period; perishable stores must be inspected ONCE every HALF-YEAR; all other stores once a YEAR — recording reasons if delayed; stores in stock OVER ONE YEAR are treated as being in excess of reasonable requirements unless sufficient reason justifies retention.
